APBot:
**General view:**
A friendly male humanoid robot with a futuristic 3D rendering design. The robot looks compact and well-proportioned

**Head:**
- Large spherical head shaped
- Glossy white surface with black accents
- Round face-bright blue (cyanide) color screen
- The screen blue (cyanide) color, shows two large expressive eyes with highlights and a sweet smile
- On the sides of the head — black sphere with blue backlight

**Housing:**
- White body with black mechanical elements
- Luminous logo with the inscription "APT" on the chest
- Additional blue luminous details on the shoulders

**Limbs:**
- Black jointed arms and legs with white segments
- Blue illumination in the joints
- Detailed brushes with fingers
- Stable feet with blue accents

**Color scheme:**
White, black and blue (cyanide)
